nasb.text: Because he did not remember to show lovingkindness, But persecuted the afflicted and needy man, And the despondent in heart, to put them to death.

esv.text: For he did not remember to show kindness, but pursued the poor and needy and the brokenhearted, to put them to death.

cnv.text: 因為他從沒有想起要施慈愛， 只知道迫害困苦、貧窮和傷心的人， 要把他們置於死地。

ccb.text: 因为他毫无仁慈， 迫害困苦、贫穷和伤心的人， 置他们于死地。

csbs.text: 因为他从不记得施慈爱， 却追逼困苦人、贫穷人、心里哀痛的人， 要置他们于死地。
